visible_when: Admin has services.edit and service exists
action_description: Create a future-effective service revision
expected_result: Future records use the revision and history is preserved
error_state: Immutable code or invalid rate/hours or version conflict

action_description: Create a one-time service and initial revision
expected_result: Service becomes available for future pricing when active
error_state: Duplicate code or invalid price/duration

visible_when: Admin has services.edit and service exists
action_description: Create a future-effective one-time service revision
expected_result: Future records use the revision and history is preserved
error_state: Historical snapshot conflict or invalid fields

action_description: Disable future selection without deleting history
expected_result: Service is hidden from future pricing
error_state: Already disabled or history preservation failure

visible_when: Service exists and Admin has services.edit
action_description: Replace versioned phase and deliverable templates
expected_result: Future projects use the updated template
error_state: Missing mandatory deliverable or version conflict

visible_when: Item exists and Admin has service_items.edit
action_description: Create a future-effective service-item revision
expected_result: Future cards and requests use the revision
error_state: Immutable code or invalid service link

action_description: Disable future item selection
expected_result: Item is hidden from future cards while history remains
error_state: Historical records cannot be mutated

action_description: Update the item-level matrix transactionally
expected_result: Future cards use the updated inclusion matrix
error_state: Invalid level or matrix consistency failure

action_description: Save labels SLA priority and customization rules
expected_result: Future service configuration uses the updated level
error_state: Invalid SLA/hours or missing Custom reason

action_description: Create a future-effective pricing-rule revision
expected_result: Future calculations use the revision
error_state: Invalid formula overlap or version conflict

action_description: Create a future-effective hours-rule revision
expected_result: Future deductions use the revision
error_state: Invalid limits or deduction policy

visible_when: Role exists and protected Admin access remains
action_description: Update role permissions and invalidate authorization caches
expected_result: Backend access changes immediately
error_state: Protected Admin lockout or invalid permission

action_description: Create a draft workflow definition and version
expected_result: A draft workflow is available for configuration
error_state: Duplicate code or invalid workflow type

action_description: Create or update a state in the draft version
expected_result: Draft graph contains the state
error_state: Duplicate state or referenced-state removal

action_description: Create or update a validated transition
expected_result: Draft graph contains the transition
error_state: Invalid source/target or unreachable graph

action_description: Activate the draft for future records
expected_result: New records pin the activated version
error_state: Invalid graph or active-version conflict

action_description: Archive without affecting pinned records
expected_result: Version is unavailable for new records
error_state: Version is still required by active records

action_description: Update a validated platform-setting group
expected_result: Settings are effective according to their version policy
error_state: Invalid value or unsafe secret handling

action_description: Create a versioned PDF template draft
expected_result: Draft is stored for preview and validation
error_state: Missing required field or forbidden token

action_description: Activate template for future documents
expected_result: Future documents use the safe version
error_state: VAT or internal-field leakage validation failure

action_description: Create a localized template revision
expected_result: Draft template is stored
error_state: Missing locale or invalid placeholder

action_description: Change future delivery behavior
expected_result: Future events respect the new status
error_state: Required system template cannot be disabled

action_description: Update a draft translation value
expected_result: Draft translation is stored
error_state: Missing key/locale or invalid placeholder

action_description: Publish a localization revision
expected_result: Future sessions use the revision
error_state: Required translation is missing

visible_when: Entry exists and Admin has catalog.edit
action_description: Persist a new display order
expected_result: Admin and pricing lists use the new order
error_state: Invalid or conflicting order

action_description: Archive without hard deletion
expected_result: Entity is unavailable for future use and history remains
error_state: Active dependency prevents archive

action_description: Create a stable monthly service and initial revision
expected_result: Service is stored as Draft or Active without changing seed history
error_state: Duplicate code or invalid category hours or rates

visible_when: Service exists and transition is valid
action_description: Enable disable or archive future service selection
expected_result: Future selection respects the new status and prior revisions remain pinned
error_state: Invalid transition or active item dependency

action_description: Create an editable monthly service category
expected_result: Category is available for future service assignment
error_state: Duplicate code or missing localized names

action_description: Update localized labels and description
expected_result: Catalog navigation uses the updated category
error_state: Immutable code or invalid localized names

visible_when: Category exists and has no incompatible active services
action_description: Enable disable or archive the category
expected_result: Future catalog use respects the status while history remains
error_state: Active service dependency or invalid transition

action_description: Create a stable service item and initial revision
expected_result: Item is available according to its lifecycle and package matrix

visible_when: Item exists and transition is valid
action_description: Enable disable or archive future item selection
expected_result: Future cards respect status and historical snapshots remain unchanged

action_description: Create a configurable package level
expected_result: Level becomes available for future hours and inclusion configuration

visible_when: Level has no incompatible active dependency

expected_result: Future configuration respects the status and pinned records remain valid
